content.json:
# AI Gateway — Governance & Observability

Token usage, model routing, cache, guardrails, throttling, latency and multi-region failover for the Azure AI Foundry + APIM AI Gateway demo. Gateway request/latency data comes from Application Insights (`AppRequests` / `AppDependencies`); Foundry token counts and request logs come from the Cognitive Services diagnostic settings (`AzureMetrics` / `AzureDiagnostics`).

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name has "/chat/completions"
| extend Deployment = tostring(split(tostring(split(Url, "/deployments/")[1]), "/")[0])
| summarize Calls = count() by Deployment, Status = tostring(ResultCode)
| order by Calls desc
content.title: Gateway calls by deployment & status

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name has "/chat/completions"
| summarize Calls = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), Status = tostring(ResultCode)
| render timechart
content.title: Requests over time (by status: 200 ok, 400 guardrail, 429 throttled)

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name has "/chat/completions"
| summarize Calls = count() by Status = tostring(ResultCode)
content.title: Status mix

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Target has "cognitiveservices"
| summarize Calls = count() by Backend = tostring(Target)
| order by Calls desc
content.title: Which Foundry backend answered (failover shows the secondary region)

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Target has "cognitiveservices"
| summarize p50 = percentile(DurationMs, 50), p95 = percentile(DurationMs, 95) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| render timechart
content.title: Model call latency (p50 / p95, ms)

content.json:
## Foundry token usage & model logs

These tiles read the Cognitive Services diagnostic data sent to Log Analytics (`AzureMetrics` for token counts, `AzureDiagnostics` for per-request logs). Allow a few minutes after the first calls for data to appear.

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where MetricName in ("ProcessedPromptTokens", "GeneratedTokens", "ProcessedInferenceTokens", "TokenTransaction")
| summarize Tokens = sum(Total) by MetricName, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| render columnchart
content.title: Token usage over time (prompt vs generated)

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where MetricName in ("ProcessedPromptTokens", "GeneratedTokens", "ProcessedInferenceTokens", "TokenTransaction")
| summarize Total = sum(Total) by Account = tostring(split(Resource, "/")[-1]), MetricName
| order by Total desc
content.title: Total tokens by Foundry account & metric

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| summarize Calls = count() by Category, OperationName, ResultSignature = column_ifexists("ResultSignature_s", "")
| order by Calls desc
content.title: Foundry request logs (by category & operation)
